mission.title: langflow: Langflow not starting with postgres - giving Sqlite error
mission.description: Langflow not starting with postgres - giving Sqlite error. Community-reported issue.

steps.title: Identify langflow troubleshoot symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your langflow installation:
```bash
pip show langflow | grep Version
```
Look for errors related to SQLite dialect being used when PostgreSQL is configured via `LANGFLOW_DATABASE_URL`.

steps.title: Review langflow configuration
steps.description: When Langflow is configured to use PostgreSQL (via `LANGFLOW_DATABASE_URL=postgresql://...`), it may still attempt to use the SQLite dialect due to a missing dialect mapping in the SQLAlchemy connection setup. This manifests as a startup error referencing SQLite even though PostgreSQL is the configured backend.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Langflow not starting with postgres
steps.description:
Ensure your Docker Compose configuration correctly sets the PostgreSQL connection:
```yaml
services:
  langflow:
    image: langflowai/langflow:latest
    ports:
      - "7860:7860"
    depends_on:
      - postgres
    environment:
      - LANGFLOW_DATABASE_URL=postgresql://langflow:langflow@postgres:5432/langflow
      - LANGFLOW_LANGCHAIN_CACHE=InMemoryCache

  postgres:
    image: postgres:15
    ports:
      - "5432:5432"
    environment:
      POSTGRES_DB: langflow
      POSTGRES_USER: langflow
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: langflow
    volumes:
      - pgdata:/var/lib/postgresql/data

volumes:
  pgdata:
```
Upgrade to a version that includes the fix for the missing SQLite dialect in the SQLAlchemy connection.

steps.title: Confirm the issue is resolved
steps.description:
Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
Restart Langflow and confirm it connects to PostgreSQL without SQLite errors.
Check logs with `docker compose logs langflow` to verify successful startup.

resolution.summary: Fixed the missing SQLite dialect mapping in the SQLAlchemy connection setup that caused Langflow to fail when configured with PostgreSQL as the database backend.
codeSnippets:
services:
  langflow:
    image: langflowai/langflow:latest
    ports:
      - "7860:7860"
    depends_on:
      - postgres
    environment:
      - LANGFLOW_DATABASE_URL=postgresql://langflow:langflow@postgres:5432/langflow

  postgres:
    image: postgres:15
    environment:
      POSTGRES_DB: langflow
      POSTGRES_USER: langflow
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: langflow

prerequisites.description: Python 3.10+ with langflow installed (pip install langflow). Docker and Docker Compose for containerized deployment with PostgreSQL.
